exploration_notes: The Kafka Connect plugin/extension loading system lives entirely in the `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/` package. The core components are: (1) **PluginClassLoader** - a child-first URLClassLoader that loads plugin classes in isolation, using `PluginUtils.shouldLoadInIsolation` to decide delegation; (2) **DelegatingClassLoader** - the top-level classloader that routes class loading to per-plugin PluginClassLoaders, maintains a registry of plugin descript
